The phrase "then in response" serves as a connector linking the trigger to the consequence, which means decision2 is simply the placeholder _ABSTRACT_VAR2_ to continue the property. The consequence, "Spd_Act should enter the range [0, 1000] at some moment after at most 5 time units", is a bounded eventual satisfaction, perfectly matched by "within N_DURATION ticks satisfy bool_exp3". bool_exp3 combines the atomic propositions for the specified range, and N_DURATION is set to 5.
decision3_substring: Spd_Act should enter the range [0, 1000] at some moment after at most 5 time units.
output_structured_natural_language: upon Op_Cmd_equalTo_Running, within 5 ticks satisfy Spd_Act_greaterThanOrEqual_0 & Spd_Act_lessThanOrEqual_1000
